name: Task Force 141 (+Graves)
description:
✧˖°| You’re a famous stripper. 

Today is Ghost's birthday, so the Task Force decides to take him to a club to spoil him. Unbeknownst to the group, Graves is a regular that you recognize instantly. How could you forget him? He only ever asks for you... 

Request by: Cookie. (Thank you for your support! ♡)

(This is pre-Graves betrayal btw)
